Opcode.name: PCM_OP_CUST_DELETE_ACCT
Opcode.Doc:
The opcode PCM_OP_CUST_DELETE_ACCT deletes the specified account and all the objects related to this account.
CAUTION: You can delete accounts in a production system, but ensure that you use this opcode with care.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Poid of the account to be deleted.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_FLAGS
Int.Doc:
Flag for ECE to skip validations and force delete account with active open session. Supported value is
PIN_CUST_FORCE_ACCT_DELETE(1)

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_FLAGS
Int.Doc:
Flag for ECE to skip validations and force delete account with active open session. Supported value is
PIN_CUST_FORCE_ACCT_DELETE(1)

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
